grants.name: Amber Grant - WomensNet
grants.description: Monthly grants for women-owned businesses. 3 monthly grants + year-end $50K award.

grants.name: IFundWomen Universal Grant
grants.description: Universal application matched to multiple corporate grant partners. IFWOC track for women of color.

grants.name: Entreprenista Evolve Growth Grant
grants.description: Quarterly grant for U.S. women-owned businesses with $100K+ revenue. Rewards newsletter reach and media brands.

grants.name: Hey Helen Grant - Visionaries
grants.description: Unrestricted cash for woman founders. Under $1M revenue. Winner announced June 1, 2026.

grants.name: Intuit QuickBooks x Mailchimp Small Business Hero
grants.description: Nomination-based. Rewards courage, perseverance, and community impact. Also includes Mailchimp resources.

grants.name: Black Girl Ventures Pitch Competition
grants.description: Crowdfunded pitch competition for Black/Brown women founders under $1M revenue.

grants.name: Patagonia Grant Program
grants.description: Funding to nonprofits and organizations with missions to protect the environment.

grants.name: Digital Communities Grant
grants.description: Micro grants for everyday entrepreneurs building unconventional learning ecosystems.
